name: Altura Golf Lab
about: Altura Golf Lab is a high-tech golf training facility that uses data and advanced technology to provide tailored instruction. The facility utilizes a full suite of tools including Trackman, Robo Golf Pro, and other systems to analyze swing mechanics and improve performance. They offer a range of programs from adult and junior coaching to club fitting services, with an emphasis on a data-driven approach to golf instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses industry-leading technology like Trackman and Robo Golf Pro for precise swing analysis
Offers comprehensive programs for both adults and juniors with customized coaching plans
Combines indoor training with outdoor playing lessons at local courses for on-course application
Provides holistic approach including fitness and nutrition alongside technical instruction

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-standard launch monitor providing club and ball flight physics data
Swing training system for creating exact swing feelings
Launch monitor for putting with high-speed camera tracking
Video capture and swing analysis software for in-person and virtual lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. Club fitting services are available to help optimize your equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed. The facility does not have an on-site kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified. However, the facility offers 9-hole playing lessons at local courses, which suggests their outdoor program focuses on shorter formats.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Altura Golf Lab offers dedicated junior programs and has experience working with young golfers, including those aspiring to play collegiate golf.
